text: Ordinary Portland cement used in general structural construction including 33, 43, and 53 grades.
43 grade ordinary Portland cement suitable for structural applications.
Code of practice for plain and reinforced concrete including materials, mix design, and construction methods.
High strength deformed steel bars and wires used for reinforcement in concrete structures.
Hot rolled structural steel used for plates, angles, and sections in construction.
Coarse and fine aggregates from natural sources used in concrete production.
Testing methods for aggregates including size, shape, and strength properties.
